reviews.comment:
Soy socia del ACA hace años y siempre voy, no solo por combustible. Tiene su costo. Y me da una cierta seguridad ya que hice el control del auto antes de ir a la VTV y fui tranquila. Salió  todo Ok. Hay que llevar el auto temprano si hace falta alguna reparación por que hay gran demanda (por lo menos en Godoy Cruz)

(Translated by Google)
I've been an ACA member for years and I always go, not just for fuel. It comes at a price. And it gives me a certain security since I had the car inspected before going to the VTV and I was at peace. Everything came out OK. You should bring your car in early if it needs any repairs because there's high demand (at least in Godoy Cruz).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzcjR5bXp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Se te gasta toda la nafta hasta que llegas a cargar tardan media hora hasta que llegas para cargar muchas pero la verdad que no esta buena esa estación de servicio están apurados no se las recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
You use up all the gas until you get to the gas station. It takes half an hour until you get there to fill up a lot, but the truth is that this gas station is not good. They are in a hurry. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzaDdhUk5nEAE
